seo.title: Online Image Background Remover | Creative Lab
seo.description: Remove backgrounds from JPG, PNG and WebP images directly in your browser with Creative Lab. Local processing, preview and transparent download.
seo.ogDescription: Remove image backgrounds directly in your browser.
seo.twitterDescription: Remove image backgrounds with local browser processing.

product.title: Remove an image background
product.description: Automatically remove the background, review the result and download a transparent image or apply a new color.

remover.title: Select an image
remover.intro: The first run downloads the processing model. Background removal then runs in your browser.
remover.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to select it
remover.uploadHelp: JPG, PNG or WebP. Maximum 20 MB.
remover.privacyNotice: The image is processed locally. The tool does not use tokens or a request-limited API.

messages.invalidFormat: Select a JPG, PNG or WebP image.
messages.fileTooLarge: The image exceeds the 20 MB limit.
messages.readError: The image could not be read.
messages.libraryError: The background removal engine could not start.
messages.processing: Analyzing the image and removing the background...
messages.processingError: The background could not be removed. Check your connection and try again.
messages.canvasError: The browser could not prepare the result.
messages.exportError: The download could not be prepared.

info.title: How to remove a background with Creative Lab
info.description: Select an image, wait for local processing, review the result and download it with transparency or a new background color.
info.stepOneText: Select a JPG, PNG or WebP image.
info.stepTwoText: The model identifies the subject and removes the background in your browser.
info.stepThreeText: Choose transparency, color and format before saving.
